title: ABOUT THE AUTHOR
text: About The Author Scarlett St. Clair lives in Oklahoma with her husband. She has a Master’s degree in Library Science and Information Studies. She is obsessed with Greek Mythology, murder mysteries, love, and the afterlife. If you are obsessed with these things, then you’ll like her books. For information on books, tour dates, and content, please visit www.ScarlettStClair.com
